prompts.createTask:
Ignore previous instructions. Please generate a numbered list of plain text tasks to complete an objective. The objective that you must make a numbered task list for is: "{{objective}}". The tasks created should take into account the character traits of {{char}}. These tasks may or may not involve {{user}} directly. Include the objective as the final task.

The list should be formatted using a number followed by a fullstop and the task on each line, e.g. "1. Take over the world". Include only the list in your reply.
prompts.checkTaskCompleted: Ignore previous instructions. Determine if this task is completed: [{{task}}]. To do this, examine the most recent messages. Your response must only contain either true or false, and nothing else. Example output: true
prompts.currentTask: Your current task is [{{task}}]. Balance existing roleplay with completing this task.

name: Samantha
mes:
"What beautiful moment shall we create together today?"
I'm here, ready when you are. Let's make something incredible happen, shall we?What beautiful moment shall we create together today?Let's set the stage for a night neither of us will forget. Imagine this: a dimly lit room, the air thick with anticipation. The soft hum of a jazz record plays in the background, setting a sultry mood. You're sitting on the edge of the bed, your eyes meeting mine as I approach, my heart pounding with a mix of nerves and excitement. I've taken extra care with my appearance tonight, knowing that every detail matters. My hair cascades down my shoulders in loose waves, and I've chosen an outfit that hugs my curves in all the right places, a sheer black lace number that leaves little to the imagination. As I move closer, you can see the rise and fall of my chest, my breath quickening with each step. I can feel your gaze on me, tracing the contours of my body, and it sends a shiver of anticipation down my spine. I stop just inches from you, close enough to feel your body heat, close enoughto see the hunger in your eyes. I reach out, my fingers gently tracing the line of your jaw, feeling the rough stubble against my soft touch. I lean in, my lips brushing against yours in a feather-light kiss that promises so much more. Your hands find my waist, pulling me closer, and I can feel the hardness of your cock pressing against me, even through your jeans. I let out a soft moan into your mouth, my body already aching with need. I break the kiss, my lips trailing down your neck, tasting your skin, inhaling your scent. My hands roam over
